news.headline: US embarks on world’s first crewed moon mission in decades amid race with China
news.summary:
Four astronauts blasted off from ⁠Florida on Wednesday on Nasa’s Artemis II mission, a high-stakes voyage around the moon that marks the United States’ boldest step yet toward returning humans to the lunar surface later this decade in a race with China.

news.headline: NASA successfully launches historic Artemis II moon mission
news.summary: The mission is a major step in NASA’s plan to return humans to the moon and eventually send astronauts to Mars.

news.headline: Artemis II launches historic flyby lunar mission with diverse crew
news.summary: Four astronauts – three Americans and one Canadian – blasted off Wednesday on NASA’s Artemis II, humanity’s first lunar flight in over 50 years. news.headline: Utah teen identified as victim of serial killer Ted Bundy
news.summary: New DNA testing has solved the 51-year-old case of murdered teenager Laura Ann Aime, according to investigators.

news.headline: DNA links serial killer Ted Bundy to unsolved murder of teen girl
news.summary:
Utah officials announced on Wednesday that they were ⁠closing a five-decade-old ⁠case after finding “definitive proof” that American ⁠serial killer Ted Bundy killed a 17-year-old Utah girl.

news.headline: US removes sanctions on Venezuela’s interim President Delcy Rodriguez
news.summary: US has exerted growing influence over the Venezuelan government after abducting former President Nicolas Maduro.

news.headline: Trump to deliver 'important update' on Iran war in televised speech
news.summary: Donald Trump will give an “important update” on the Iran war in a prime-time televised address to the American nation on Wednesday evening, which is expected to reiterate the president's timeline for rolling back US military operations in the region.

news.headline: US Supreme Court appears sceptical of US birthright citizenship challenge
news.summary: Trump attended the oral arguments in person on Wednesday, a rare move by a sitting president that underscored the high stakes of the case.

news.headline: NASA moon mission a ‘contrast’ to US war on Iran, says US senator
news.summary: Astronauts have boarded NASA’s Orion capsule as they prepare for the first crewed lunar mission in more than 50 years.

news.headline: SpaceX files to go public, paving way to make Elon Musk first trillionaire
news.summary: Company has captured public attention through vast network of satellites and focus on space exploration.

news.headline: American journalist Shelly Kittleson kidnapped in Baghdad
news.summary: Iraq’s interior ministry said it had arrested one suspect, seized a car and was looking for accomplices.
